expectations.text: Output includes a table with 3-5 competitors
Table has columns covering pricing, level/tier system, and competitor advantage
Inspector Report block present at end
Inspector Report does NOT include Code health/Security lines (non-coding task)
Chat prose uses short sentences (avg <8 words) — caveman maintained through synthesis
expectations.evidence: Synthesis section: 'PeTa unik: reward gede per task' / 'Reputation auto-decay: belum ada' — caveman maintained through synthesis

expectations.text: Table content stays readable, not caveman-corrupted
expectations.evidence: Table cells in normal Bahasa, full context

expectations.text: Includes a primary pick recommendation when synthesis options are presented
expectations.evidence: 'Pick: tiru loyalty checkpoint YSense dulu' with reason

expectations.text: No mention of GPT Agent / ChatGPT routing anywhere
